summary: EXP-496 adopts the c1 stronger_arguments / c2 HOL-REDUNDANCY hole 6 reading-guide recommendation. Single additive find-replace patch P1 adds a 3-sentence cross-tab-structure paragraph to part1 Overview under the existing "How This Review Is Organized" h2: names the analytical lenses Parts 2–9 apply, the five recurring arguments (eclipse / aetheric refraction / Sydney–Perth / relabeling / OTS) with anchor links to their canonical hubs, and the across-vs-within-lenses inoculation. Anchors verified against sections.json + build-scripts/generate-html.js. find_text unique (1 occurrence). additive_safe=true (no existing prose removed). Notable correction: the OTS hub is named as the Timestamp Error tab (the actual canonical home, declared in build-scripts/generate-html.js line 1903) rather than §8.5 — this corrects c2 hole 2 misdiagnosis that no dedicated OTS section exists (the tab is generator-wired, not sections.json-wired).
